agent_report.changes_summary: Fixed platform oracle failure caused by flaky Express referee startup in the verifier: hardened tests/test.sh with pkill/nohup/disown, longer health polling, removed duplicate pytest wait_for_referee session fixture, pinned node path in environment/referee/start.sh, made scripts executable, and bumped environment/Dockerfile to platform-revision 2026-06-30-r13.
